/usr/bin/ar qc libAMidiOrganBinaryData.a CMakeFiles/AMidiOrganBinaryData.dir/juce_binarydata_AMidiOrganBinaryData/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMidiOrganBinaryData.dir/juce_binarydata_AMidiOrganBinaryData/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMidiOrganBinaryData.dir/juce_binarydata_AMidiOrganBinaryData/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMidiOrganBinaryData.dir/juce_binarydata_AMidiOrganBinaryData/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMidiOrganBinaryData.dir/juce_binarydata_AMidiOrganBinaryData/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMidiOrganBinaryData.dir/juce_binarydata_AMidiOrganBinaryData/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData6.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libAMidiOrganBinaryData.a
